instr: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.

en: dumbbell one arm chest fly on exercise ball
instr: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.

en: smith machine reverse decline close grip bench press
ru_current: Жим лёжа в Смите узким хватом на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instr: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground.

ru_current: Жим штанги на скамье с отрицательным наклоном
instr: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.

en: cable one arm fly on exercise ball
instr: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:1 Adjust the cable pulleys to chest height.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
